description: A player has been fined by the league for criticizing officials in a post-game interview. An agent must process the fine.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the disciplinary report detailing the fine.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the player has been fined $10,000.

nodes.task_description: Notify the player's team of the fine.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a formal notification to the team.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for the fine to be automatically deducted from the player's next paycheck.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sets up the payroll deduction.
